opinion.h4: PRIMBS v. CALIFORNIA. APPEAL FROM THE APPELLATE DEPARTMENT OF THE SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, LOS ANGLES COUNTY. No. 730, Misc. Decided June 30, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Roger Arnebergh and Philip E. Grey for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
